title: billing-statement model captures periodic billing summaries
content:
# billing-statement model captures periodic billing summaries

`powerhouse/billing-statement` (7 ops) produces periodic billing summaries. Since [[subscription-instance model tracks active customer subscriptions with lifecycle state]], billing statements likely aggregate subscription charges per billing cycle.

## Cross-Model References

- SubscriptionInstance → BillingStatement (billing cycle outputs)
- May reference [[accounts model defines the chart of accounts structure]] for account assignment
- May feed into [[invoice model generates formal payment requests]]

---

description: 7 operations — aggregates billing data into periodic statements; referenced from subscription-instance for billing cycle outputs
